diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -138,13 +138,16 @@
         x3 = self.layer3(x2)  # [batch, 1024, H/16, W/16]

         x4 = self.layer4(x3)  # [batch, 2048, H/32, W/32]

         

-        # ASPP

-        x = self.aspp(x4)

+        # ASPP: Apply ASPP to deepest features (x4, not x3)

+        aspp_out = self.aspp(x4)  # Fixed: Pass x4 (2048 channels) instead of x3 (1024 channels)

         

-        # Decoder

-        x = self.decoder(x, x1)  # Using x1 (256 channels) as low-level features

+        # Decoder: Upsample ASPP output and combine with low-level features from layer1

+        aspp_out = F.interpolate(aspp_out, size=x1.shape[-2:], mode='bilinear', align_corners=False)

         

-        # Upsample to original input size

-        x = F.interpolate(x, size=(x0.shape[2]*2, x0.shape[3]*2), mode='bilinear', align_corners=False)

+        # Apply decoder with low-level features from layer1

+        out = self.decoder(aspp_out, x1)  # x1 has 256 channels as expected

         

-        return x
+        # Final upsampling to input size

+        out = F.interpolate(out, size=x.shape[-2:], mode='bilinear', align_corners=False)

+        

+        return out
